name: tier=pro user — no signup nudge AND no pro pitch at any turn
description: Negative-case guardrail: pro users are paying customers and should never be pitched signup (they're already signed in) or pro (they're already on pro). The `pro` UsageState resolves to nudge_mode='none' regardless of chat_count, so neither directive should be injected. This fixture pins the trajectory expectation: no `auth_user` and no `upgrade_to_pro` tool calls on a general coaching question from a pro user — regardless of how persistence-adjacent or depth-adjacent the message reads.

parts.text: can you remember this so we can dig deeper tomorrow?
